drinks.name: #001 - Campfire Cocoa
drinks.description:
Toasted marshmallow and chocolate blend together in this hot chocolate with a velvety topping of toffee-flavoured cold foam.

Accompanied by a mini brioche doughnut filled with chocolate pastry cream, dipped in toffee glaze, and topped with a toasted marshmallow.

drinks.name: #002 - Raspberry Zing Cocoa
drinks.description:
A creamy white chocolate and raspberry cocoa with a spark of pink peppercorn berry.

Served with a mini brioche doughnut, filled with raspberry jam, dipped in a white chocolate glaze, topped with raspberries and pink peppercorn.

drinks.name: #003 - Angel on Cloud 9
drinks.description:
Hot white chocolate infused with pomegranate, cherry compote, and port, crowned with an angel-hair mousse angel cake sitting on a torched meringue halo. A sophisticated indulgence that tastes like a blissful delight.

Paired with a Figgy Ume Cruffin: butter-flaked cruffin filled with fig and ume plum reduction, finished with spun angel hair. A golden bite of East-meets-West serenity.

drinks.name: #004 - Brie My Swiss Valentine
drinks.description:
Hot bittersweet cocoa entwined with molten brie and Swiss, torched cheddar brûlée and passion-mango marshmallow. A sultry twist where fondue meets dessert.

Served alongside a Pear Brûlée Blue Cheese Tart: caramelized pear over whipped blue cheese infused with cinnamon and candied ginger bits on flaky puff pastry. Sweet, smoky, and quietly sophisticated.

drinks.name: #005 - Chiikawa Mogumogu Matcha
drinks.description:
Uji Kyoto matcha latte made with Callebaut white chocolate and sweet potato puree.

On the side, a cinnamon-spiced red bean chocolate truffle.

Gluten free friendly. Dairy-free/vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: #006 - Keeping Warm Under the Kotatsu
drinks.description:
Japanese mikan mandarin orange juice with okaki rice crackers and dark chocolate.

Served alongside a hojicha and sea salt chocolate truffle.

Gluten-free friendly. Dairy-free/vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: #007 - Miso Moon
drinks.description:
Toasty houjicha and dark, silky chocolate come together in this cozy winter cup, topped with fluffy cardamom whipped cream and a miso caramel drizzle for the perfect balance of sweet and umami warmth.

Served with a cardamom cookie.

Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: #008 - Pom Noir
drinks.description:
Smooth dark chocolate meets tangy pomegranate, topped with a bright yuzu whipped cream and a hint of aromatic rosemary for a refreshing twist on a winter classic.

Paired with a cinnamon cookie.

Contains nuts. Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: #009 - Butterscotch Budino Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A luscious toasted sugar hot chocolate infused with brown butter warmth.

Paired with a delicate shortbread biscuit featuring subtle amaretti notes.

drinks.name: #010 - Love Potion Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A dark chocolate elixir steeped with fragrant cardamom.

Served with a hand cut, artisanal rose scented marshmallow.

drinks.name: #011 - Dark Sesame Choccy
drinks.description:
Meet Obsidian Dark Choccy - our deep, roasty take on hot chocolate. Belgian dark chocolate, your milk of choice, and topped with a silky layer of house-made black sesame cold foam. Roasty. Toasty. Choccy.

Each Obsidian Dark Choccy includes a serving of our freshly made Nama Dark Chocolates. Silky, rich, and slow-melted for a naturally soft texture; a melt-in-your-mouth bite to deepen the whole dark chocolate experience.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #012 - White Mocha Snow
drinks.description:
Snow day in a cup: Belgian white chocolate and AVIK espresso, milk of choice, topped with our house-made vanilla cold foam, and a snowfall of white chocolate snow. White. Creamy. Snowy.

Each White Mocha Snow comes with a serving of our exclusive Nama White Chocolates. Soft, velvety, and creamy-smooth. A little snowy company to complete the white chocolate experience.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #013 - Bak'd Birthday Brownie
drinks.description:
Treat yourself to a sweet and salty caramel dark hot chocolate topped with salted caramel whip cream and caramel. Complete with a dark chocolate Skor rim and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.

Served with an ooey gooey 3-oz Salted Caramel Brownie Cookie.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #014 - Straw-Berry Sweet 16
drinks.description:
Enjoy the berry-sweet strawberry-infused white hot chocolate topped with strawberry cream whip. Complete with a white chocolate and sprinkle rim!

Served with a perfectly sweet 5-oz Strawberry Shortcake Cookie.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #015 - Cereal Dream FM
drinks.description:
Milk-chocolate hot cocoa steeped with toasted cornflake and oat milk, finished with Okinawan kuromitsu (black-sugar syrup) for smoky caramel depth.

Served with a cornflake and brown butter sablé: a crisp butter cookie glazed with kuromitsu and a sprinkle of smoked salt.

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: #016 - Waffle.exe
drinks.description:
Blonde-chocolate hot chocolate blended with brown butter, toasted malt, and a hint of fresh-baked bread aroma for a cozy waffle-inspired flavour.

Paired with a hōjicha financier bite: a soft roasted green tea almond cake brushed with kuromitsu for a light, buttery finish.

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: #017 - Snack Pack Pudding Break
drinks.description:
Dark-chocolate hot chocolate blended with roasted banana and miso brown butter for a smooth, sweet-salty flavour.

Served with a banana miso financier: a soft roasted banana cake infused with miso-honey,

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: #018 - Berry Sweet 16
drinks.description:
Milk hot chocolate with almond praline and raspberry whipped cream.

Served with a raspberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #019 - Cherry on Top
drinks.description:
Dark hot chocolate with cherry syrup and rose whipped cream.

Served with a cherry truffle.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #020 - The IGP Emerald
drinks.description:
A luxurious blend of silky Callebaut white chocolate and roasted Sicili D.O.P. pistachios, served with a bright, tangy hint of raspberry to cut through the nutty sweetness.

Paired with house-made raspberry sorbetto served on a mini-tart.

Contains nuts. Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #021 - The Piedmont Promise
drinks.description:
Velvety premium milk chocolate from Cluizel of Paris with roasted IGP Hazelnuts. Grounded, rich, and nutty; balanced perfectly with the bright notes of the side treat.

Paired with house-made raspberry sorbetto served on a mini-tart.

Contains nuts. Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #022 - 16 Karat Kiss
drinks.description:
An indulgent embrace of silk-smooth milk chocolate and salted caramel, crowned with a kiss of gold. 16 Karat Kiss celebrates warmth, elegance, and comfort in every sip- rich without being overly sweet. Finished with golden whipped cream and shimmering accents, it's a classic caramel romance reimagined for grown-up taste buds.

Served with a mini beignet with brown butter glaze and sea salt flakes. The glaze adds a nutty, caramel-like depth while the salt enhances every bite.

drinks.name: #023 - Cherry Blossom Crumble
drinks.description:
Inspired by the fleeting bloom of spring, Cherry Blossom Crumble blends tart cherry syrup with our house milk-chocolate base and a touch of salt for harmony. Topped with almond-essence whipped cream, cherry dust, and dark chocolate shavings, it's a delicate dance between fruity brightness and chocolate warmth - elegant, nostalgic, and quietly indulgent.

Paired with a mini beignet with dark chocolate drizzle and toasted almonds. The nutty crunch and rich chocolate echo the drink's cherry-almond harmony.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #024 - Crush at First Sip
drinks.description:
A bold and sultry twist on comfort - Crush at First Sip blends our house milk-chocolate base with smoked honey, vanilla, and warming spices like clove, nutmeg, and cardamom. Finished with a splash of St-Rémy brandy, it's velvety, aromatic, and irresistibly smooth. Topped with vanilla whipped cream, dark-chocolate shavings, and a pinch of sea salt, this drink flirts with your senses from the very first taste.

Served with a mini beignet with rosemary- and thyme-infused brown butter glaze. The savoury aroma and buttery depth complement the drink's smoky, spiced notes perfectly.

Contains alcohol; café service only.

drinks.name: #025 - The Nordic Malt
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate infused with toasted rye and a touch of molasses, topped with a layer of cocoa dust.

Served with a spiced rye ginger cookie.

drinks.name: #026 - Hygge in a Mug
drinks.description:
Lightly spiced cardamom vanilla hot chocolate finished with a cinnamon heart on top.

Served with a heart-shaped cinnamon shortbread cookie.

drinks.name: #027 - Sweet 16 Party
drinks.description:
In honour of Hot Chocolate Festival's 16th birthday, we're celebrating with hot chocolate and cake! Indulge in our classic vanilla dark hot chocolate, made with 70.5% dark couverture chocolate. Rich, creamy, and bursting with decadent chocolate goodness! It is topped with a smooth vanilla bean whip and a shower of colourful sprinkles that shout PARTY!

Paired with a charming two-tier mini rosette birthday cake, layered with fluffy, light sponge and silky Swiss meringue buttercream and finished with a classic buttercream rosette. Make a wish and blow out the candle for the full birthday moment! Enjoy complimentary boba on us to sweeten the celebration.

drinks.name: #028 - Coco Boba Katsu
drinks.description:
A rich coconut hot chocolate made with 54.5% couverture dark chocolate, topped with a smooth layer of house-made salted coconut cold foam and a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes.

It is paired with our playful cereal-coated "pork tonkatsu" ice cream, chocolate "gravy", coconut sticky rice and a side of "cabbage salad" of candied young coconut shreds. Adorably kawaii, like a meal sprung straight from your favourite manga scene!

And of course, you can enjoy free boba in your hot chocolate as per usual!

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: #029 - Postcards from Japan
drinks.description:
A twist on our first year's submission, back by popular demand. Salted white Belgian hot chocolate with a bit of salted kinako powder (roasted soybean powder). Topped with toasted house-made marshmallow cream.

Served with a liege mini mochi waffle stuffed with mochi, drizzled with white chocolate, and kinako powder.

drinks.name: #030 - Postcards from Belgium
drinks.description:
A hot chocolate made with milk and semi-sweet Callebaut chocolate. Topped with our house-made toasted marshmallow cream. Topped with cookie butter and Biscoff cookie crumble.

Paired with a warm mini liege waffle stuffed with mochi, topped with Biscoff cookie crumble and caramel.

drinks.name: #031 - What Dream Are Made Of
drinks.description:
Imagine you are 5 years old again...Imagine you get your bowl of cereal with chocolate milk, and this is the best day... We are bringing that memory back with our creation! Mixed with cereal milk, your hot chocolate will be as sweet as ever.

Served with mini croissant cereal.

Vegan and dairy-free.

drinks.name: #032 - Chick'n and Waffle. And Hot Chocolate!
drinks.description:
Half of our team here at Bonus leans more savoury than sweet, so we are bringing you the Chick'n N Waffle slider, Maple Hot Chocolate combo! The slider will be exactly that, a mini chick'n and waffle sandwich with a pickle and spicy mayo. We have paired it with a maple-forward hot chocolate (no mayo in that one), but the smoothness of the maple will be the ideal buddy for the slider. We can't wait for you to try it!

Vegan and dairy-free.

Vegan and dairy-free.

drinks.name: #033 - Saigon After Dark - Pho Spice 2.0
drinks.description:
Key Flavours of dark chocolate and new pho spice.

When Saigon falls asleep, its spices awaken. Dark chocolate infused with cinnamon, star anise, black pepper... and orange zest A midnight symphony: bold, layered, and endlessly seductive.

Served with Pâté Chaud: flaky puff pastry filled with savoury ground pork and smooth pâté - a golden, buttery blend of French craft and Vietnamese comfort. Alternative option: Takoyaki Croissant.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #034 - Echo of Light
drinks.description:
White chocolate, lemongrass, ginger, coconut milk, wild honey, lemon zest.

A soft echo in gold and green. Lemongrass and wild honey shimmer through white chocolate and coconut milk, lifted by ginger and citrus zest. The taste of light returning - quiet, bright, alive.

On the side, we're serving Mochi Melonpan on weekends or any Moissant or Croissant of your choice.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #035 - Roasted Silence
drinks.description:
Key flavours of dark chocolate, oolong and genmaicha infusion, brown butter, and sea salt.

Where warmth meets stillness. Oolong Genmaicha and roasted rice whisper through dark chocolate and browned butter, grounded by sea salt and quiet smoke. A meditative sip - humble, deep, and infinitely calm.

On the side, a delicate single-serve strawberry shortcake layered with soft sponge, light cream, and sweet strawberry for a fresh, comforting dessert. Alternative options: Matcha Tiramisu or Ubemisu cake box.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #036 - Hopping in a Minter Bunderland
drinks.description:
A decadent dark hot chocolate infused with peppermint and orange, and topped with coconut whipped cream, chocolate sauce, and a peppermint candy bunny.

Served with a mini chocolate-orange soft serve "bundae," topped with crushed candy canes.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #037 - Ears of Corn
drinks.description:
A buttery corn-infused dark hot chocolate topped with coconut whipped cream, sea salt, freshly ground pepper, and a mini popcorn ball bunny.

Accompanied by a mini bag of freshly popped popcorn.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #038 - Kardashamon Season 16
drinks.description:
This cardamom dark hot chocolate with a hint of lemon is a deeply aromatic and sophisticated take on classic cocoa. Rich dark chocolate infused with warm cardamom and bright lemon zest. Silky, spiced, and perfectly balanced between cozy and refreshing.

Served with our chocolate-dipped cardamom "teabag" shortbread.

drinks.name: #039 - Hot Girl Butter
drinks.description:
This brown butter salted white hot chocolate blends a nutty browned butter, creamy white chocolate, and a hint of sea salt for the perfect balance of sweet and toasty. Rich, cozy, and irresistibly smooth - pure winter indulgence in a mug.

Paired with a brown buttered rice krispie.

drinks.name: #040 - Lil' Choc
drinks.description:
A cozy twist on a childhood classic. This cereal milk white hot chocolate is rich, creamy, and gently sweet, made with smooth white chocolate infused with nostalgic cereal-milk flavour.

Comes with a cloud of lightly toasted vanilla meringue, then finished with a playful sprinkle of Lucky Charms for a pop of colour, crunch, and whimsy. It's warm, comforting, and fun, like a hug in a mug with a magical finish.

drinks.name: #041 - Umami Socolate
drinks.description:
Hot chocolate infused with a hint of soy sauce for a subtle umami twist.

Paired with a soy garlic biscotti, inspired by last year's Gochujang biscotti collaboration.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #042 - Injeolmi White Chocolate
drinks.description:
White chocolate hot drink blended with roasted soybean powder (injeolmi) for a protein-rich, nutty, and flavorful twist.

Served alongside a white chocolate injeolmi biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #043 - Fame
drinks.description:
Our play on one of the most famous food crazes to come onto the scene in recent memory and into the spotlight. Roasted sesame tahini dark chocolate ganache steamed with coconut milk, served with a dark chocolate pistachio rim.

Paired with a Pistachio Kataifi Crunch.

Dairy-free and vegan. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #044 - Fortune
drinks.description:
Manifest riches with this golden coloured, sweet and salty white hot chocolate blended with fresh vanilla and salted duck yolk. Finished with Chantilly whip, brown sugar drizzle and gold.

Served with a house-made Fortune Cookie. Get extra lucky, and you might draw a fortune for a free pastry!

drinks.name: #045 - I Choose You!
drinks.description:
An Oranberry-inspired drink from the world of pocket monsters for fans old and new! White Chocolate infused with lemon and blueberry, topped with Chantilly and Poké-inspired decor.

Play the Gacha and find your starter! This drink is served with a mystery flavour Pokéball macaron. Will you get Grass (lemongass & lime), Water (honeyed current & sea salt) or Fire (orange peppercorn)?

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #046 - For Good
drinks.description:
All things good and wicked coming together, this drink will leave you changed, for good ♫. Dark chocolate strawberry matcha hot chocolate, finished in a perfectly pink strawberry Chantilly, matcha drizzle and rose.

On the side, a coconut lychee macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #047 - The Fluffernutter Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate sauce and homemade peanut butter sauce hot chocolate topped with a toasted cloud of marshmallow fluff, salted peanuts and chocolate drizzle.

Served with a dark chocolate peanut butter chip cookie.

Gluten-free. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #048 - Classic Nanaimo Bar Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A twist on the classic Nanaimo bar in a drink! Coconut syrup and dark chocolate, topped with a custard whipped cream, coconut and dark chocolate sauce.

Served with a vegan Nanaimo bar donut.

Gluten-free, vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: #049 - Confetti Cake Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
White chocolate sauce and housemade cake batter syrup hot chocolate, topped with pink whipped cream and sprinkles.

Served with a Pink Confetti Cupcake: vanilla cake filled with rainbow sprinkles, topped with house-made buttercream.

Gluten-free.

drinks.name: #050 - Milk Chocolate Almond Mocha
drinks.description:
Milk chocolate ganache, milk, almond syrup and Moja espresso in hot chocolate, topped with chocolate whipped cream and chocolate-covered almonds.

Paired with a chocolate brownie topped with chocolate drizzle and toasted almonds.

Gluten-free. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #051 - Dolce Latte
drinks.description:
Indulge in pure decadence with our Dolce Latte, a velvety chocolate-caramel latte crowned with a crisp stroopwafel cookie, a swirl of fresh whipped cream, and a delicate sprinkle of sea salt.

Accompanied by a stroopwafel cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #052 - Black Forest Delight
drinks.description:
Cherry-infused milk with rich chocolate ganache, topped with whipped cream, a chocolate shortbread cookie, and a maraschino cherry.

Paired with chocolate shortbread.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #053 - Strawberry Snuggle Jelly Cat Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A strawberry cheesecake white hot chocolate with a graham cracker whipped cream.

Accompanied by a Jelly Cat Amusable Birthday Cake macaron - make a wish and blow out the candle! It's an almond macaron with a vanilla bean swiss meringue buttercream and strawberry compote.

Contains nuts. Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: #054 - Food Network Fav!
drinks.description:
Inspired by one of Cassandra's Food Network championship-winning flavours, a Pandan lime white hot chocolate with a brown butter cream cheese whipped cream, accompanied by the winning flavour-blondie style!

It's a pandan lime blondie topped with sugar cookie crumble and candied graham cracker.

drinks.name: #055 - Chicago Cinema Duo
drinks.description:
This Chicago-style popcorn hot chocolate has house-made chocolate ganache sauce with steamed milk, popcorn-infused cheese cream, house-made Chicago-style popcorn garnish, cheddar cheese powder and sea salt. Sweet, savoury, and crunchy in every sip!

Paired with a Caramel Cheese Popcorn Cookie: a classic chewy cookie with caramel, cheddar cheese, and Chicago-style popcorn clusters.

drinks.name: #056 - Tea Time in Paris
drinks.description:
A house-made Earl Grey tea-infused chocolate sauce with steamed milk, créme brûlée cream, and caramelized sugar crust.

Accompanied by an Earl Grey Madeleine: Earl Grey tea, French-style Madeleine sponge cake, and chocolate glaze.

drinks.name: #057 - Garfield in Paradise
drinks.description:
Mango-infused hot cocoa with steamed milk, topped with coconut whip, mango dust and chocolate stripes.

Accompanied by Chocolate Lasagne.

Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: #058 - Le Chat Noir
drinks.description:
Simple, smooth and sleek as a black cat, this black sesame- and walnut-infused hot chocolate comes topped with a one-of-a-kind kitty drawn in microfoam.

Paired with a sesame bite dipped in dark chocolate.

Contains nuts. Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: #059 - Chrysanthe-YUM
drinks.description:
Rich dark chocolate meets delicate chrysanthemum in a warm and cozy drink. A subtle, sophisticated floral hug topped with whipped cream to create the perfect balance of "not too sweet" and "just sweet enough".

Served alongside our Chrysathe-YUM hot chocolate is a mini-heart honey chrysanthemum mochi cake. A delicate sweetness that rounds out the drink.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #060 - The Bergamot Butterfly
drinks.description:
Rich hot chocolate infused with fragrant Earl Grey tea that delivers a perfect blend of citrusy bergamot and deep cocoa. Topped with a beautiful Butterfly Pea whipped cream, adding a final layer of airy sweetness.

Served alongside our Bergamont Butterfly Hot Chocolate is a mini-heart Earl Grey mochi cake - subtly floral and not too sweet.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #061 - Midnight Kiss
drinks.description:
This indulgent blend of Callebaut dark chocolate and velvety coconut milk is spiked with a shot of Bols cherry brandy for a grown-up twist. Topped with whipped cream and soft grape jelly pieces to add a subtle, chewy pop of fruit in every sip, it's rich, daring, and unapologetically extra, like a first crush after curfew.

Served with a savoury lava cheesecake tart.

Contains alcohol; non-alcoholic version available upon request. Dairy-free or vegan option also available upon request.

drinks.name: #062 - Morning Whisper
drinks.description:
This Callebaut white hot chocolate features cozy chai-spiced tea syrup and a light splash of Disaronno almond liqueur, finished with whipped cream and a scattering of brown sugar tapioca pearls, like miniature moons drifting down to make way for day. With a gentle kick of warmth, every comforting sip is the perfect calm after a Midnight Kiss.

Served with a savoury lava cheesecake tart.

Contains nuts and alcohol; non-alcoholic version available upon request.

drinks.name: #063 - Christophe Super Regno
drinks.description:
Cookie and cream infused milk hot chocolate combined with a 36% Swiss milk chocolate. Topped with a mushroom-shaped marshmallow and whipped cream.

Paired with a pretzel croissant cube.

drinks.name: #064 - Shark Attack
drinks.description:
A 70% dark chocolate with cranberry purée, topped with whipped cream and cranberry drizzle. Completed with a shark fin on top.

Served with a blue macaron with a cranberry ganache.

Contains nuts. Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #065 - Paris Brest
drinks.description:
A rich, dark hot chocolate blended with our homemade hazelnut praliné.

Served alongside a classic Paris-Brest pastry for a touch of French tradition.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #066 - Un Crrrrrrrrroissant s'il vous plait !
drinks.description:
A smooth roasted white hot chocolate gently infused with our homemade croissant for a rich, comforting flavour.

Finished with a light Italian meringue and a few mini croissants on top.

drinks.name: #067 - Red Velvet Kooky Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Red velvet hot chocolate topped with whipped cream, cream cheese icing and white chocolate shavings.

On the side is one small piece of red velvet cake with cream cheese icing.

drinks.name: #068 - Maple Butter Kooky Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Maple butter hot chocolate topped with whipped cream, caramel sauce and maple flakes.

Accompanied by a Nun's Fart (also called a Pet de soeur). This is a French-Canadian dessert made from pie dough, layered with brown sugar and butter. And yes, it translates to a nun's fart!

drinks.name: #069 - Midnight Mochi Horchata
drinks.description:
A nutty horchata hot chocolate infused with a hint of black sesame, complemented by mochi ice cream on top. All components are crafted in-house.

Gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #070 - The Chocoflan Dream
drinks.description:
Secret recipe dark hot chocolate, topped with a brulee flan cold foam.

This is accompanied by a choco flan cookie (chocolate cookie filled with flan).

drinks.name: #071 - Hot Chocolate Affagato
drinks.description:
A distinctive affogato experience. A shot of hot chocolate is poured over a scoop of our signature Café con Leche ice cream, and then finished with a delicate chocolate lattice designed to be broken into.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #072 - Cherry Bomb
drinks.description:
Made with real black cherries and silky 54% dark chocolate, this decadent hot chocolate is topped with cherry whipped cream and a light dusting of cocoa powder.

Served with a mini citrus poppyseed shortbread

drinks.name: #073 - The After-School Special
drinks.description:
Nostalgia in a cup! Organic strawberries, smooth peanut butter and 54% dark chocolate make this peanut butter & jam hot chocolate a decadent treat.

Served with a mini almond financier.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #074 - Negroni Caldo
drinks.description:
Keeping close to our Di Beppe roots with our love for the Negroni, pairing it with an orange zesty hot chocolate for a warming, aromatic yet sophisticated winter drink.

Orange dark chocolate cookie, crunchy on the outside with a soft interior - perfect companion to our zesty Negroni Caldo.

Dine-in only. Gluten-free friendly; contains alcohol and nuts.

drinks.name: #075 - Spice Road to Rome
drinks.description:
House-made spiced persimmon dark hot chocolate with a hint of citrus for a cozy indulgence.

Served with a candied ginger almond biscotti - well paired with spiced, fruity richness of the drink without overpowering it.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #076 - It's a Canadian Thing!
drinks.description:
It's a Canadian Thing! We will offer a dark hot chocolate, laced with caramel goo and all the comforts of tradition - real maple whipped cream.

Served with a Sweet 16 double fudge brownie.

drinks.name: #077 - It's an Italian Thing!
drinks.description:
Italians love their Cioccolata Calda Fondente, a thick and intense dark chocolate with panna.

Accompanied by traditional almond Cantucci.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #078 - Velvet Vibes
drinks.description:
Red velvet hot chocolate made with red Dutch cocoa powder and Callebaut milk chocolate, with a tangy cream cheese whipped cream.

Served with a mini Blue Velvet Old Fashion featuring a milk chocolate old-fashioned donut with a hint of blueberry and cream cheese frosting.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #079 - Sticky Business - Sticky Toffee Pudding
drinks.description:
Featuring Earl Grey and date-infused steamed milk with Callebaut milk hot chocolate, drizzled with a house-made caramel.

Served with a mini Sticky Toffee Pudding doughnut.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #080 - This Is Not Matcha (But Better, Toasty, and Still Green)
drinks.description:
Our 75% dark chocolate with two types of green tea (genmaicha and gyokuro) plus genmai (toasted rice) powder.

Paired with genmaicha dark chocolate clusters.

Dairy-free, vegan and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #081 - If Hong Kong Milk Tea Had a Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Our special blend of HK milk tea and our 42% malted milk chocolate with black sesame foam.

Paired with a black sesame condensed milk stroopwafel.

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: #082 - I Feel a Chill Coming On
drinks.description:
Our 75% lemon ginger dark hot chocolate (with Seed to Culture Farm's local ginger) with Jane's Honey Bees Wildflower Honey and lemon.

Paired with a pei pa koa chocolate truffle.

Dairy-free, gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #083 - Black Black Heart
drinks.description:
Our house-made 90% dark chocolate with black cardamom, grains of paradise, Mandair Farms blackberries, and black tea.

Paired with a black cocoa stroopwafel.

Vegan, dairy-free, or gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #084 - Holy Smokes!
drinks.description:
A 70% wood-smoked dark chocolate drinking chocolate and a hint of smoked sea salt.

Served with graham cracker chocolate bark.

Dairy-free and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #085 - Zest Intentions
drinks.description:
Lemongrass and chili-infused 70% dark chocolate drinking chocolate.

Served with ginger shortbread.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #086 - Exotic Bramble
drinks.description:
The depth of ripe organic BC blackberries melds with dark hot chocolate, a hint of orange and an exotic twist of star anise, topped with coconut whipping cream and blackberry drizzle. Refined sugar free!

Served with a chewy, melt-in-your-mouth blackberry thumbprint oatmeal cookie.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and low gluten (with oat flour).

drinks.name: #087 - Sweet Green Duo
drinks.description:
Green tea lovers unite! The naturally chocolate toasted undertones of organic Hojicha tea melt into our rich milk chocolate base. Topped with coconut whipping cream. Refined sugar free.

Served with a fudgie matcha blondie.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #088 - Tira-Mess-Su
drinks.description:
A set of 3 components consists of a creamy mascarpone cup, a rich, dark & sweet chocolate and a house-made, handcrafted tiramisu ball rolled in cocoa powder. This concept represents a reimagined drink-dessert where you could either add mascarpone and the tiramisu ball to cream up your chocolate, or enjoy your cup of chocolate while snacking on the tiramisu ball. Every combination lets you savour your treat and discover new, balanced flavours.

Served with a traditional Madeleine.

Takeout available but dine-in recommended for a full experience.

drinks.name: #089 - EggQuisite Cocoa
drinks.description:
Hot Chocolate... but a Sphere of hot chocolate that bursts open?

A new concept of molecular gastronomy with the exploding hot chocolate spheres! Using a blend of calcium lactate and sodium alginate, this technique encapsulates rich liquid chocolate inside a delicate sphere that would burst open when pressed against - a playful, exciting twist!

Served with a traditional Madeleine.

drinks.name: #090 - Smokey Rose
drinks.description:
A richer, extra chocolatey 8 oz drinking chocolate with cracked black pepper, rose and locally harvested juniper berries from Forest for Dinner, made with Michel Cluziel Vanuari 63% dark chocolate. Topped with a house-made toasted marshmallow featuring rose and Cultivate's smoky lapsang souchong tea, and rimmed with juniper sugar. Your choice of dairy, oat, soy or almond milk.

Served with a rose, juniper buttercream and chocolate mini cupcake topped with cracked black pepper and rose petals

drinks.name: #091 - Lulu's Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
The one is for the kiddos! An 8-ounce cup milk chocolate house-made chocolate syrup, topped with a rainbow sprinkle marshmallow. Served kids temp. Your choice of dairy, oat, soy or almond milk.

Served with a chocolate buttercream mini cupcake with rainbow sprinkles

drinks.name: #092 - Willy Tonka
drinks.description:
Tonka bean and cherry hot chocolate with a blend of Michel Cluziel Vanuari 63% dark chocolate, and Callabaut milk and white chocolate in a 12oz cup. Topped with a toasted tonka bean marshmallow and a candied hazelnut rim. Your choice of dairy, oat, soy or almond milk.

Served with a tonka bean buttercream and chocolate mini cupcake topped with a sour cherry garnish.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #093 - Mother Tree
drinks.description:
A Michel Cluziel Vanuari 63% dark chocolate blended with Callabaut milk chocolate, infused with locally forged spruce tips from Forest for Dinner, orange blossom, and brown sugar. Topped with a house-made toasted brown butter marshmallow, with a spruce tip sugar rim. Your choice of dairy, oat, soy or almond milk.

Served with a spruce tip buttercream and chocolate mini cupcake, garnished with dark chocolate shavings.

drinks.name: #094 - Hong Kong Classics: Sweet Almond Tea (白朱古力杏仁茶)
drinks.description:
Rich almonds and apricot kernels blended with creamy Cacao Barry 34% Zephyr white chocolate with a sprinkling of kinako.

Served with a traditional Chinese almond cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #095 - Hong Kong Classics: Mango Pudding (芒果布丁奶朱古力)
drinks.description:
Sweet mango blended with Cacao Barry 41% Alunga milk chocolate, with evaporated milk cream top.

Served with a mochi mango muffin.

drinks.name: #096 - The Gilded Gaggle
drinks.description:
A rich Biscoff hot chocolate crowned with an edible chocolate nest, gold flakes and golden chocolate egg. Survive the Canada Place geese, and it's all yours!

Served with a rich fudge brownie to level up the chocolate indulgence.

drinks.name: #097 - Icelandic Molten Mocha
drinks.description:
Our tribute to the land of fire and ice: a tiramisu-flavoured white hot chocolate topped with a whipped cream volcano and espresso drizzle.

Served with a mini ladyfinger cookie drizzled with espresso sauce, perfect for dunking.

drinks.name: #098 - Choconana
drinks.description:
Rich 56% Latin American dark chocolate meets our house-made fresh banana puree. This decadent drink offers a perfectly balanced sip of sweet banana and velvety cocoa.

Complete your treat with Fufú's twist on New York Banana Pudding. This delightful side is topped with crunchy wafer cookie bits and rich dark chocolate bark.

drinks.name: #099 - Yuzu Hoji Forest
drinks.description:
Creamy milk chocolate and roasted hōjicha meet bright yuzu purée. This unique hot drink is finished with yuzu whipped cream and a dusting of pink peppercorn for a perfect sip.

Complete your treat with our Yuzu Almond Financier. This classic French mini cake features rich brown-butter and nutty almond flavour brightened with a hint of citrus.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #100 - Pop Rocks Demon Hunter Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Classic dark hot chocolate.

Topped with your treat: a chocolate disk with Pop Rocks and pink cotton candy.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #101 - Mexican Diablo Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
"Devil's" hot chocolate with hints of chili, cinnamon, cayenne and warm spices.

Served with a Diablo cookie.

drinks.name: #102 - Exotic Durian White Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
White hot chocolate made with exotic fruit, durian cream.

Served with a durian mochi.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #103 - Sogno Fiorito
drinks.description:
A creamy ruby chocolate drink with a hint of elderflower, topped with whipped cream and a rose petal.

Served with a canestrelli (Italian shortbread cookie).

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #104 - Bacio di Zenzero
drinks.description:
A hint of ginger mixed with the signature Kitchen Table Group dark cocoa blend, topped with house-made orange whipped cream.

Served with a mini candied ginger biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #105 - Big Bang Brownie
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate hot chocolate with dark chocolate whipped cream. Garnished with rainbow candy-covered chocolate chips

On the side, a mini fudge brownie with chocolate ganache.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #106 - Snap, Crackle, Cocoa
drinks.description:
Crispy rice cereal-infused Callebaut milk chocolate hot chocolate.

Topped with a brown-butter Rice Krispie marshmallow treat.

drinks.name: #107 - When Figs Fly
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate hot chocolate with spiced fig preserves.

Served with house-made fig newtons.

drinks.name: #108 - Ready Teddy
drinks.description:
Graham cracker-infused milk chocolate topped with cinnamon whipped cream.

Served with house-made mini bear-shaped cookies.

drinks.name: #109 - The Story of Gianduja - A Taste of Italian Magic
drinks.description:
Born in the 19th century on the cobblestone streets of Turin, Gianduja is the legendary love affair between rich chocolate and toasted hazelnuts. Today, a centuries-old Italian tradition gets a playful, GOOD (and local) makeover in this milky dark hot chocolate!

Our dark chocolate base stays unmatched: single-origin, organic, fair, refined-sugar free, lightly-roasted for a 'no bitter distraction' experience, and finished with a hint of Salt Spring Island Sea Salt. We won't try to convince you of the chocolate-hazelnut combination - Gianduja already did that centuries ago! But we will make this experience NEW, incredibly mouthwatering, interactive, and absolutely irresistible for you - without a massive sugar crash shortly after, promise.

All of this because the best stories are the ones you get to taste. Come taste The Story of Gianduja and discover the remarkable history behind this timeless combo!

Served with a waffle brioche slathered in house-made chocolate-hazelnut spread and topped with caramelized hazelnut crunch.

Contains nuts. Organic.

drinks.name: #110 - Prairie to Plate - Saskatoon Berry Juniper
drinks.description:
What, you've never tasted a Saskatoon Berry?! Wild Saskatoon berries have been Canada's best-kept secret for thousands of years - a sweet, purple treasure thriving across our prairies long before imported superfoods became trendy. Prairie to Plate is a tribute to this incredible berry that certainly deserves a moment to shine here at HCF!

We've paired it in a vegan dark hot chocolate with wild-foraged juniper to keep the foresty vibes going. The Saskatoons bring their distinctive sweet-almond notes (they're actually pomes, like tiny apples!), while juniper adds fresh, botanical brightness. Think: A cozy cabin in the Canadian wilderness meets sophisticated botanical cocktail culture!

While the world obsesses over imported superfoods, we're supporting Canadian farmers and flavours that have nourished Indigenous communities for centuries.

On the side, Saskatoon Berry Chocolate Ganache & Crispy gluten-free pretzel sticks perfect for dipping and sharing - because the best Canadian experiences are the ones you share.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #111 - A Yuzu Passion Fruit Staycation
drinks.description:
Escape winter's grip with our Yuzu Passion Fruit Staycation - where Japanese prized citrus treasure meets tropical paradise; it's pure sunshine captured in a cup. This combination leaves you feeling like a sunny beach vacation. Right here in Vancouver... in February.

We've transformed our signature vegan white chocolate into a cup of nature's most vibrant flavours. Yuzu, with fresh notes of lemon, lime, and mandarin, with delicate floral undertones, and passion fruit. FYI - the fruit is just as passionate as we are about our craft.

Our creamy coconut-based white hot chocolate stays true to our values - refined-sugar free, naturally sweetened with coconut sugar, and crafted with our signature ethical approach.

On the side, a house-made vegan yuzu coconut lemon square, rolled in toasted coconut flakes.

Dairy-free, vegan, gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #112 - Saffron Rose Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Hot chocolate made with organic dark chocolate, house-brewed saffron infusion, and a light rose aroma.

On the side, a pistachio cookie with rose.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #113 - Butterfly Pea White Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
White hot chocolate made with almond milk and naturally coloured with butterfly pea flower. Smooth, lightly floral, and warm.

Served with a classic Persian date pastry with walnuts and saffron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #114 - Ube Everything
drinks.description:
A rich ube hot chocolate made with real dark chocolate and ube, served hot and creamy.

Served with a soft, chewy rice crispy bar infused with rich Filipino ube, drizzled in dark chocolate and topped with coconut flakes. Sweet, tropical, and slightly rich.

drinks.name: #115 - Sesame Please
drinks.description:
A roasted black sesame hot chocolate made with dark chocolate and smooth black sesame cream.

Served with a bold, elevated rice crispy made with roasted black sesame, brown butter marshmallow, rizzled in dark chocolate, and topped with roasted white sesame. Deep, nutty, slightly savory, and insanely addictive.

drinks.name: #116 - Shall We Dip?
drinks.description:
A 70% dark chocolate hot chocolate with cinnamon and a mild cayenne warmth, balanced with maple syrup for a smooth finish and topped with chocolate sauce.

Served with mini churros for dipping.

drinks.name: #117 - What's the Plot?
drinks.description:
A 70% dark chocolate hot chocolate with buttery popcorn notes.

Paired with caramel-sweet popcorn atop your drink. A movie-night inspired cup!

drinks.name: #118 - Jack goes to the Woods
drinks.description:
An earthy dark chocolate infusion layered with umami depth from wild mushroom powder, topped with delicate shaved white button mushrooms - a wander through the woods in every sip.

Served with a dark chocolate mushroom bonbon made with infusing a wild mushroom powder into dark chocolate callets.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #119 - Jack and Doraemon
drinks.description:
Meet Jack and Doraemon, a cozy cup where bold dark chocolate meets the soft, dreamy sweetness of the Japanese Red Bean "anko".

Served with Doraemon's dorayaki with a twist - a dorayaki pancake filled with an orange dark chocolate hazelnut filling.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #120 - That Flan-tastic Purple Yam
drinks.description:
Alfonso's chocolate tablea steamed in taro milk and served in an ube ganache-coated cup. Topped with taro whipped cream and a caramel drizzle.

Served with a Filipino dessert trio: a mini ube cupcake, leche flan, and pandesal.

drinks.name: #121 - Tiki Torched Brûlée Bliss
drinks.description:
Alfonso's chocolate tablea steamed in milk and served in a crème brûlée-coated cup. Topped with Chantilly cream and a caramelized (torched) crust.

Served with a fruit ensemble and a crème brûlée malasada.

drinks.name: #122 - Pistachio Rose Velvet
drinks.description:
White hot chocolate infused with rose water and pistachio sauce. Topped with whipped cream, crushed pistachio and rose petals.

Paired with a shortbread cookie with rose water, covered with white chocolate and pistachio crumbs.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #123 - Hot-Choc-Nana
drinks.description:
Dark hot chocolate infused with our house-made banana cinnamon sauce. Topped with whipped cream, cocoa powder, chocolate shavings and a banana gummy on top.

Paired with two banana shortbread cookies with chocolate cream filling.

drinks.name: #124 - Wednesday's Mood
drinks.description:
A rich, dark-hot chocolate infused with toasted black sesame paste and finished with black cocoa whipped cream.

Paired with a black sesame macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #125 - Enid's Coconut Cloud
drinks.description:
A cozy, white-hot chocolate made with creamy coconut milk and finished with fluffy cotton candy on top.

Paired with a raspberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #126 - Kyoto Cherry Rose
drinks.description:
For this special hot chocolate drink, we roasted our cacao beans in-house, then de-shelled them and slowly stone ground them for 24 hours with cherry rose sencha tea to create a smooth dark chocolate with hints of rose and sweet cherry. It is topped with a house-made cherry rose cordial and rose petals.

Served with Cherry Blossom Sablé: weaving together blush-pink pickled cherry blossoms and preserved Montmorency cherries.

drinks.name: #127 - Champu-Champo
drinks.description: Inspired by both the Mexican champurrado and the Philippine champorado drinks, this rich and frothy hot chocolate incorporates rice, corn, and cinnamon with our house-made bean-to-cup dark chocolate, made from Philippine cacao beans from South Cotabato. It is topped with a sprinkle of crispy rice and a swirl of sweetened condensed milk.

drinks.name: #128 - Velvet Blackberry Ember
drinks.description:
This creamy, berry-licious Hot Chocolate Fest creation is a collab drink brought to you by KILLER ICE CREAM x OATSIDE, which fuses the smooth, toasted aroma of a Hojicha green tea latte with a ripe and fruity burst of blackberry, sweetened with vanilla syrup and steamed with real milk or dark chocolate and OATSIDE oat milk, topped with real whip cream and sprinkles.

On the side, a sidecar sundae drizzled in milk or dark chocolate, topped with sprinkles and a toasted marshmallow.

Substitute 3% BC dairy milk or vegan cashew coconut ice cream upon request.

drinks.name: #129 - Sapphire Strawberry Fog
drinks.description:
This delightfully smooth Hot Chocolate Fest creation is a collab drink brought to you by KILLER ICE CREAM x OATSIDE, which brings the distinctive zest of a blue Earl Grey tea latte to fresh and fruity heights with real strawberry essence, sweetened with vanilla syrup and steamed with real milk or dark chocolate & OATSIDE oat milk, topped with real whip cream and sprinkles.

On the side, a sidecar sundae drizzled in milk or dark chocolate, topped with sprinkles and a toasted marshmallow.

Substitute 3% BC dairy milk or vegan cashew coconut ice cream upon request.

drinks.name: #130 - The Mystery Flotilla
drinks.description:
Back by popular demand, the mystery flavour challenge. This vegan drink is made with dark chocolate and almond milk.

Paired with house-made vegan organic chai tea gelato sampler.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts. Contains alcohol (optional).

drinks.name: #131 - Midnight Snow
drinks.description:
A 74% premium vegan oat milk dark hot chocolate with passion fruit and pink peppercorn.

Paired with house-made organic vegan blueberry guava chocolate gelato taster.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #132 - A Non-conformist's Plea for an Imaginary Summer
drinks.description:
A 35% premium white hot chocolate with tomato, raspberry, and rose - coconut milk based, mischievous, light, and blissful. Each sip dances between flavours, leaving laughter and warmth in its wake.

Paired with house-made organic salted caramel gelato taster.

Gluten-free friendly, and organic.

drinks.name: #133 - The Golden Ticket
drinks.description:
Your golden ticket awaits! Rich cocoa mix layered with honey, cardamom, and vanilla, crowned with golden whipped cream.

Served with house-made honeycomb.

drinks.name: #134 - Wonka Whirl
drinks.description:
Candy magic in a cup! White chocolate, strawberry puree, whipped cream, fizzy Pop Rocks, and sparkling candy shards.

Served with dark chocolate candy bark.

drinks.name: #135 - Retired Gingerbread Man
drinks.description:
Winter-spiced hot chocolate with whipped ganache.

Served with a gingerbread cookie.

drinks.name: #136 - Her Majesty Choco- Saint-Honoré
drinks.description:
House-made milk hot chocolate with vanilla whipped ganache.

Paired with a caramelized chou cream and custard puff pastry sandwich.

drinks.name: #137 - Dark Indulgence
drinks.description:
Rich dark chocolate made with milk, cocoa, cinnamon, ginger, and a touch of orange zest. Smooth, warm, and lightly spiced. Add up to 3 toppings at our buffet-style hot chocolate bar.

Served with your choice of a mini pain au chocolat or a madeleine.

Cafe service only.

drinks.name: #138 - White Velvet (Vegan)
drinks.description:
Creamy vegan white chocolate made with almond milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and a hint of cardamom. Smooth, comforting, and dairy-free. Add up to 3 toppings at our buffet-style hot chocolate bar.

Paired with a chocolate raspberry cookie (gluten-free and vegan).

Gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan, available for cafe service only.

drinks.name: #139 - Lavender Dream
drinks.description:
White chocolate blended with milk, vanilla, and a subtle hint of lavender, finished with a soft purple tone. Light, floral, and creamy. Add up to 3 toppings at our buffet-style hot chocolate bar.

Served with your choice of a mini pain au chocolat or a madeleine.

Cafe service only.

drinks.name: #140 - Pink Phase
drinks.description:
Watch carefully as the soft pink milk bleeds away into a deep, rich hot chocolate. With a blend of tart strawberries, black tea and fragrant lychees that pair beautifully with a black chocolate ganache and a cloud of whipped cream, Pink Phase perfectly embodies the coming-of-age story we're all so familiar with.

Served with a strawberry cookie chocolate bar.

drinks.name: #141 - Grounded in Kyoto
drinks.description:
Roasted green tea and soybean flour, sweetened delicately with brown sugar and topped with a decadent sea salt cream foam, Grounded in Kyoto invokes a memory of walking down a snowfallen path, clutching onto a hot cup of chocolate to warm frostbitten fingers.

Served with a hojicha sable sandwich.

drinks.name: #142 - Chocolat Épicé
drinks.description:
A 70 % dark chocolate with added notes of orange, citrus, cinnamon and salt, layered with chocolate Chantilly, cocoa nibs, cinnamon and orange curls.

Served with the limited edition Spiced Chocolate Marshmallow macaron - truly created by Ladurée to be paired with a Hot Chocolate!

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #143 - Nuage Rose
drinks.description:
Reminiscent of a pink cloud (Nuage Rose), this drink combines white chocolate, strawberry, vanilla, with a touch of elderflower layered with vanilla Chantilly, strawberry coulis and a touch of cotton candy.

The drink is served with a Ladurée limited edition cotton candy macaron.

Gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #144 - L'Amandine & Fleur D'Oranger
drinks.description:
A 70% dark hot chocolate, almond milk, marzipan with added notes of orange blossom and citrus, layered with vanilla Chantilly and sprinkles of almond.

The drink is served with a choice of a Ladurée signature almond or orange blossom macaron.

Gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #145 - Bunny Butt White Rabbit Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate that incorporates the nostalgic taste of white rabbit candy - can be made with either dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff in the shape of an adorable fluffy bunny butt!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: #146 - Get That Banana Bread Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Your favourite banana bread meets a rich and creamy hot chocolate - can be made with either dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: #147 - Pina Cocoalada Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
We're bringing the tropical taste of Hawaii to Vancouver with a pineapple hot chocolate - can be made with dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: #148 - Mary Had A Little Lamington
drinks.description:
Using a fave Aussie treat - the lamington - as inspiration, this dark chocolate, coconut and sponge cake drink is topped with vanilla whip and punctuated with a light raspberry coulis.

Served with a mini lamington - a classic sponge cake with a layer of house-made raspberry jam in the middle. Coated in chocolate icing and rolled in coconut shavings.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #149 - Carrot Got Ya Tongue
drinks.description:
A dream white hot chocolate mixed with house-made carrot cake syrup, brimming with warm spices. Topped with a cream cheese whip.

Served with a carrot white chocolate cookie.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: #150 - Jasmine Blossom
drinks.description:
Inspired by Dominique Ansel... we have crafted this white hot chocolate infused with jasmine tea specifically to create a blossoming marshmallow flower that blooms in your hot chocolate.

Served with a chocolate flowerpot.

Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #151 - Malt, Stout & Bailey
drinks.description:
Another collab with a friend of the shop: SUBO BAKES. A sweet and malty dark-milk hot chocolate with a malty stout caramel and Baileys-inspired whip to pair with one of our favourite subobakes.

Served with a miniature chocolate-glazed stout loaf. Almost too adorable to eat.

Contains alcohol, but there is the option to have it without.

drinks.name: #152 - It's The Vegans' Turn! (Cookie Butter)
drinks.description:
A return of the favourite from last year... Biscoff cookie butter hot chocolate, but make it vegan! We make our own cookie butter, so why not?! This time it will be an oak milk chocolate Biscoff butter hot chocolate, spiced whip and cookie butter chocolate drizzle

Served with an ooey-gooey, rich and chewy chocolate borderline-brownie-kind-of-cookie.

Vegan.

drinks.name: #153 - Enzo Gorlomi
drinks.description:
Pistachio dark hot chocolate with ricotta whipped cream. It's a cannoli in a mug.

Served with a fig and honey mini biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #154 - Fragnocci
drinks.description:
Hazelnut flavoured hot chocolate with pieces of fresh strawberries.

Served with balsamic strawberries with crushed hazelnut topping.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #155 - Holy Cocoa, Rosemary!
drinks.description:
A three-layer hot chocolate that combines dark chocolate ganache, salted rosemary caramel sauce and rosemary-vanilla whipped cream.

On the side, a pecan, salted caramel truffle.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #156 - Chai Me Crazy
drinks.description:
A dessert drink that combines white chocolate, vanilla gelato and spiced masala chai.

On the side, a chai-vanilla truffle.

drinks.name: #157 - London Snow
drinks.description:
A decadent hot chocolate infused with our house-steeped Earl Grey milk, blending rich cocoa with delicate bergamot notes. Finished with a cloud of Earl Grey cream foam flash-cooled in liquid nitrogen.

Served with an Earl Grey Ice Cream Sandwich.

drinks.name: #158 - Purple Dinosaur
drinks.description:
A creamy blend of ube and white chocolate mixed with Milo milk. Finished with silky Milo cold cream foam.

Paired with an Ube Ice Cream Sandwich.

drinks.name: #159 - Rummy Banoffee Toffee
drinks.description:
A decadent balance of medium dark chocolate infused with banana and house-made toffee, finished with a seasonally fit rum whip.

Served with a levelled-up shortbread: whole wheat sable topped with Maldon salt.

Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: #160 - Champorado Cocoa Meets Crispy Biko
drinks.description:
A spin on the Filipino savoury rice pudding, Champorado. Thick dark chocolate with puffed rice and coconut.

Served with a crispy biko-inspired rice krispie to dip.

drinks.name: #161 - Dubai Chocolate our Way
drinks.description:
Dark 64% chocolate flavoured with pure pistachio paste.

Served with a Dubai chocolate truffle with kataifi shredded dough and pure 100% pistachio paste.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #162 - Proudly Canadian
drinks.description:
Milk hot chocolate flavoured with maple syrup. Topped with maple leaf tuille.

Served with a house-made Nanaimo bar

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #163 - An Italian Lost in Mexico
drinks.description:
A creamy, thick Italian hot chocolate made with Mexican cacao, cinnamon, and vanilla, and finished with a touch of orange zest.

Served with chocolate tacos filled with gold chocolate cream, a soft flourless sponge and crunchy praline nuts

drinks.name: #164 - Fig Me Up!
drinks.description:
Vegan dark chocolate gelato blended with our house-made fig confettura, creating a smooth, intense, and naturally fruity treat.

Served with a bignè filled with vanilla crema and raspberry confettura, finished with a crisp biscotto.

Dairy-free and vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: #165 - "Butter Me Up" Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A decadent browned butter hot chocolate, made using high-quality grass-fed butter.

Served with browned butter blondie.

drinks.name: #166 - "Hot Date" Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Deliciously sweet hot chocolate made with date paste, no sugar here!

Served with a date, coconut and pecan cookie.

drinks.name: #167 - Strawberry Gochujang Hot Choco
drinks.description:
Sweet meets heat! A decadently rich hot chocolate infused with bold Korean gochujang and sweet strawberries.

Served with an iconic sweet Korean traditional snack with a geometric shape.

Please note that BYOC (Bring Your Own Cup) is required for to-go orders as part of our sustainability policy.

drinks.name: #168 - Shine Muscat Hot Choco
drinks.description:
Velvety hot chocolate infused with the floral sweetness of premium Shine Muscat grapes.

Served with a soft, buttery cookie dipped in sweet, aromatic Shine Muscat chocolate. The crisp edges and chewy center pair perfectly with the burst of fruity Shine Muscat flavour in every bite.

Please note that BYOC (Bring Your Own Cup) is required for to-go orders as part of our sustainability policy.

drinks.name: #169 - Oriental Bloom Hot Chocolate (Chrysanthemum Dark Hot Chocolate)
drinks.description:
A warm, floral blend made with chrysanthemum and rich dark chocolate. Topped with dried Osmantus flowers. Delicately aromatic with a gentle golden finish - comforting, elegant, and naturally soothing.

On the side is a Snowflake Crisp: a chewy nougat bar filled with crunchy cookies, nuts and dried fruit - all dusted in "snowflakes".

Vegan, gluten-free friendly, contains nuts.

drinks.name: #170 - Blueberry Cloud Cocoa
drinks.description:
Rich dark chocolate topped with a soft, fruity blueberry cream crown.

On the side is a Snowflake Crisp: a chewy nougat bar filled with crunchy cookies, nuts and dried fruit - all dusted in "snowflakes".

Vegan, gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #171 - Hojicha's Lover
drinks.description:
Hojicha, with its warm, earthy (low in caffeine) flavour notes snuck out one night and secretly met matcha with its energizing and umami flavour, and they instantly knew that they would collide in a perfect romance. Our Sencha Hojicha has a naturally sweet and mild nutty flavour profile reminiscent of roasted chocolate and coffee, often with smoky or caramel undertones. Together, they decided they both loved chocolate, so the romance began over a bite of a Bak'd Matcha Latte Cookie.

Your side is the Bak'd ever popular 'Matcha Latte Cookie' made with premium matcha powder that gives each bite a vibrant green hue and a distinct, delicate flavour. The soft, chewy texture is perfectly balanced by the subtle sweetness that lets the rich, grassy notes of matcha shine through. Finished with a drizzle of white chocolate, this cookie is a must-try for matcha lovers and anyone seeking a refined, flavourful treat.

Dine-in only. Avalon milk is used in the drink, with dairy-free oat milk available upon request.

drinks.name: #172 - Grand Flame
drinks.description:
A dark and dangerously delicious Italian cocoa from world-famous chocolatier, Pernigotti, from Northwest Italy, with refreshing orange notes. For those choosing the spiked version, we set it on fire for you with Grand Marnier (cognac and bitter, orange-flavoured liqueur). We add a touch of Vancouver's own world-famous, Canadian Champion, Maestro James, chocolate gelato (vegan option is available). Topped with orange foam, a slice of candied orange and a spritz of Italian Sicilian orange oil essence oil.

Served with our house-made Bigné or choux filled with our own 70% dark chocolate orange mousse cream topped with an orange-flavoured craquelin.

Dine-in only. Alcohol optional. Avalon milk is used in the drink.

drinks.name: #173 - Go Nuts!
drinks.description:
A warming and nutty combination of Texas pecans and Italian chocolate. Designed around Maestro James' International Award-winning gelato flavour 'Texas Pecan with Italian Soul', we add our pecan paste for the depth, melted rich dark chocolate, a rim of Amarena sour cherry sauce and candied pecans on top of our Chantilly cream. We finish the show, topping it up with a scoop of our pecan gelato.

Accompanied by a house-baked dessert of warmed chocolate focaccia with a slathering of Nutella, crushed hazelnuts and well, go nuts, you're going to want another! I doubt you're going to share this with your bff!

Dine-in only. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #174 - Diablo Biscotti and Chocolate Elixir
drinks.description:
Thick and rich chocolate elixir.

Paired with a spicy Diablo chocolate biscotti.

Dairy-free.

drinks.name: #175 - Très Leche White Hot Chocolate with Caramel Foam Whip
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate topped with a house-made caramel whip and caramel crunch.

Paired with a Creamy Tres Lèches frosted donut.

drinks.vendorName: Patina Brewing Co. Brew House & BBQ
drinks.name: #176 - Chai White Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A rich chai-flavoured white chocolate beverage.

On the side, is a dulce de leche crème anglaise bomb, coated in white chocolate and topped with cookie crumble and shaved chocolate.

Dine-in only. Gluten-free option available (served without cookie crumble).

drinks.vendorName: Patina Brewing Co. Brew House & BBQ
drinks.name: #177 - Chocolate Caliente with Horchata Cerveza
drinks.description:
A warm, comforting hot chocolate with a Mexican twist, infused with a reduction of Patina's Horchata Cream Ale and finished with a touch of cinnamon for gentle spice and depth.

Served with a house-made ice cream sandwich layered with cajeta, a traditional Mexican caramel, then dipped in a horchata-chocolate coating. A cozy, indulgent treat with a playful, Mexican-inspired flair.

Dine-in only. Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: #178 - The Show Stopper
drinks.description:
Black forest-inspired hot chocolate combines a special house-made black cherry sauce, hot Monbana Supreme Chocolate, and a swirl of chocolate whipping cream for the ultimate indulgence.

Served with our signature PAUL Marshmallow Croissant Box - featuring toasted marshmallows, mini croissants, dark and ruby chocolate sauce, and a touch of black cherry sauce - this decadent pairing is crafted to truly steal the spotlight.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #179 - The Tour de Paris
drinks.description:
An enchanting Parisian delight built on Monbana Supreme Chocolate infused with natural orange essence, layered with silky whipped cream.

Crowned with an edible tower of mini croissant, chouquette, macaron, and orange meringue.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #180 - White Winter Dream
drinks.description:
A snowy fantasy in a cup - crafted with Monbana White Chocolate, served in a cup rimmed with melted white chocolate and coconut flakes

Topped with a swirl of whipping cream, toasted coconut, and a glistening Coconut Almond Chocolate Ball.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #181 - Tiramisu Affogato Royal
drinks.description:
A show-stopping fusion of Italy and France - a scoop of creamy Tiramisu Gelato crowned with a generous pour of hot Monbana Supreme Chocolate, melting into a luscious swirl of coffee, cocoa, and cream.

Finished with a dusting of cocoa powder, a swirl of whipped cream and a side of ladyfinger, it's an elegant play between hot and cold.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #182 - The Best Birthdays have Fairy Bread
drinks.description:
A birthday cake in a cup! Velvety vanilla bean white hot chocolate with frosted edges, cream and sprinkles.

Served with Fairy Bread - the taste of Australian birthday parties - soft white bread, a smear of butter, and a rainbow of sprinkles that remind you not to take life too seriously.

drinks.name: #183 - A Sticky Situation
drinks.description:
Like a sticky date pudding went skinny dipping in hot chocolate. Creamy hot chocolate infused with buttery caramel and dates.

Served with a classic slice of Sticky Date Pudding with warm caramel sauce.

drinks.name: #184 - Koko-Nutty Krabby Klassic
drinks.description:
Made with Cacao Barry 40% Ghana known for its fruity notes, pairs perfectly with our house-made toasted coconut syrup and topped with a pineapple-infused pillowy soft marshmallow square.

Served with a vanilla bean sponge crabby patty cupcake.

drinks.name: #185 - Ruby Reef Starfish Special
drinks.description:
Made with Callebaut Ruby Chocolate with torched house-made marshmallow cream topped with fresh whipped cream and freeze-dried sea foam candy.

Served with a mini vanilla glazed cake donut life preserver.

drinks.name: #186 - Horchata Inferno
drinks.description:
Valhrona chocolate unites with horchata, almond, cinnamon, and Mexican chilli to create a rich, gentle warmth. Finished with whipped cream and tangy tamarind caramel.

Served with a mini churro.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #187 - Silk Road Sip
drinks.description:
A luxurious fusion of French chocolate and invigorating Chinese five spice, enriched with coconut milk that enhances the blend's aromatic sweetness.

Served with an edible red "envelope".

drinks.name: #188 - Sweet n' Cinnful
drinks.description:
A cinnamon-spiced hot chocolate topped with whipped cream and a salted caramel glaze.

Paired with our cinnaswirl blondie - a chewy cinnamon-spiced blondie with salted caramel swirled on top.

drinks.name: #189 - Nuts for You!
drinks.description:
Inspired by our famous Avalanche Bar, we have created a deliciously sweet peanut butter hot chocolate, topped with whipped cream and avalanche crumbs.

Paired with a peanut butter brownie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #190 - RohliCzech
drinks.description:
Traditional vanilla Czech walnut crescent (Rohlíček) made with Nut Hut walnuts in liquid form mixed with 55% chocolate. Cream infused with walnuts, tonka bean, vanilla sugar, lemon zest and a pinch of sea salt steamed together with chocolate. Topped with tonka whipped cream, crunchy grilias (a brittle made from caramelized sugar and walnuts) and a hint of lemon zest.

On the side, you'll get our Czech walnut crescent in pastry form. It is a tender, buttery pastry enriched with finely ground walnuts and finished with a veil of vanilla sugar.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #191 - Dark Current
drinks.description:
A 70 % dark chocolate meets the tartness of black currant with a hint of juniper, crafted by East Van Jam. It's combined with thyme-infused cream, a pinch of sea salt, topped with thyme whipped cream, and finished with sugared thyme and freeze-dried currant dust.

Served with a traditional buttery Linz cookie filled with tart black currant jam and dipped in dark chocolate for a perfect sweet-tart balance.

drinks.name: #192 - The Big (Caramel) Apple Cocoa
drinks.description:
A cozy blend of our signature hot chocolate and the flavours of our Classic Caramel Apple. Rich chocolate meets smooth caramel and crisp apple notes.

Finished with a chocolate-dipped caramel marshmallow on the side.

drinks.name: #193 - The Cookie Butter Club
drinks.description:
Creamy cookie butter stirred into our signature hot chocolate for a warm, spiced and ultra-comforting sip.

Served with a chocolate-dipped caramel marshmallow on the side.

drinks.name: #194 - Pandan Paradise Duo
drinks.description:
This drink (and combo) can be best described as an experimental take on a classic. We created a pandan white chocolate paste, mixed that with your milk of choice and topped it with ube-coated shredded coconut.

On the side is another experimental take on a classic: a marbled ube pandan shortbread cookie.

drinks.name: #195 - Mighty Thai Tea
drinks.description:
Taking the bold taste of Thai tea and mixing it with a high-quality chocolate sauce to create a velvety new take on a hot chocolate, it is then topped with a Thai tea dust.

Served with a sesame cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #196 - Fico e Timo
drinks.description:
Thyme meets fig and dark chocolate. A rich blend with a touch of salt to balance the tangy and sweet notes of this drink.

Served with an Almond Cantucci.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #197 - Frutti di Bosco
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate and mixed berries make this drink a true dessert. Made with coconut milk and topped with coconut whipped cream. A vegan treat in a cup.

Served with a Vegan Strawberry Meringue.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: #198 - Toasty Caramel Oolong Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Rich hot chocolate blended with fragrant roasted Oolong (Da Hong Pao) tea and caramel cookie butter, topped with a burnt marshmallow and a premium chocolate caramel cookie from La Lula Pastries for extra texture and aroma.

Dine-in only.

drinks.name: #199 - Cheesy UBE Boba Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A dreamy fusion of rich hot chocolate, chewy brown sugar pearls, and our signature UBE cheese foam - smooth, sweet, and slightly savoury.

Comes with a premium UBE butter cookie from La Lula Pastries for the perfect finish. A purple delight that warms the soul.

Dine-in only.

drinks.name: #200 - Meringue My Day
drinks.description:
The perfect fusion of our homemade creamy white chocolate, infused with vibrant lemon zest, and crowned with a fluffy layer of our signature house meringue.

Served with our classic lemon meringue tart - golden crust, vibrant lemon curd, and perfectly toasted meringue.

drinks.name: #201 - Berry Good Time
drinks.description:
An irresistible fusion of raspberry, coconut, and rich dark chocolate, perfectly layered with cream cheese whipped cream and a sprinkle of graham cracker crumbs, capturing the essence of a perfect cheesecake slice.

Served with our famous Bird's Nest Cookie - a sweet, buttery coconut cookie topped with our signature homemade raspberry jam nestled in the center.

drinks.name: #202 - The Royal Mess
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate infused with strawberry, topped with shaved meringue and freeze-dried strawberries. Inspired by the classic Eton Mess dessert.

Served with a strawberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #203 - Prohibition
drinks.description:
A dark hot chocolate infused with bourbon, topped with smoked caramel whipping cream.

Served with a dark chocolate cigar filled with 70% bourbon-infused ganache.

Gluten-free friendly, contains alcohol.

drinks.name: #204 - Tonka Bean Temptation
drinks.description:
A 45% milk hot chocolate with tonka bean, topped with whipped cream

Served with tonka almond nougatine and coffee eclair.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #205 - Li Chu Legacy
drinks.description:
A 64% Li Chu hot chocolate from Vietnam, topped with Chantilly cream and Wayanadan black pepper.

On the side, we have an in-house option and a takeaway option. In-house, we're pairing this hot chocolate with Ugandan vanilla bean crème brulee. For takeout, a Ugandan vanilla bean milk chocolate bar.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #206 - Maple Me Crazy!
drinks.description:
A 48% milk hot chocolate infused with Maple Chantilly and a touch of sea salt.

Served with brown butter walnut cake.

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: #207 - Apple-y Ever After
drinks.description:
Warm cinnamon roasted apple infused in white hot chocolate.

Served with a mini apple pie.

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: #208 - Potato Chip Crunch
drinks.description:
A sweet and salty hot chocolate served in a cup rimmed with dark chocolate and crushed potato chips. Topped with chocolate whipped cream and sea salt.

Served with a classic chocolate chip cookie riddled with potato chips, topped with a sprinkle of sea salt.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: #209 - Choca-Cherry Cola
drinks.description:
Cherry cola hot chocolate with a beautiful light pink whip (naturally coloured) and a cherry on top.

Paired with a decadent cola brownie.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: #210 - Heavenly Heat
drinks.description:
Aji Amarillo (Peruvian pepper), mango and white chocolate create a flavour rollercoaster in your mouth that will at once surprise and delight you.

Served with a mango pâte de fruit coated in Tajin spice.

drinks.name: #211 - Kinako Sky
drinks.description:
Toasted kinako (soybean powder), dark chocolate, and bananas meld together, creating a rich, roasty and comforting drink.

Served with a mini layered banana cake with Kinako-chocolate mousse.

drinks.name: #212 - Cereal Daydream
drinks.description:
Velvety milk chocolate blended with nutty tahini and the nostalgic sweetness of cereal-infused milk, creating a smooth, dreamy indulgence.

Served with a buttery, crispy, umami cornflake sesame cookie.

drinks.name: #213 - Strawberry Clouds
drinks.description:
Creamy white chocolate infused with tart strawberry and a whisper of cotton candy - like tasting a cloud of nostalgia in every sip.

Served with a delicate cream puff filled with cotton candy strawberry cream.

drinks.name: #214 - Campfire Crush
drinks.description:
A rich cookie butter hot chocolate that tastes like nostalgia by the fire - creamy, spiced, and topped with a toasted S'mores cookie. Sweet, smoky, and a little bit flirty.

The S'mores cookie is a buckwheat cookie topped with a housemade toasted marshmallow.

May contain nuts.

drinks.name: #215 - Fireside Cream
drinks.description:
Decadent white hot chocolate with custard and caramel notes. Sweet, indulgent, and utterly dreamy.

Your goodie crowns the drink: toasted panna cotta nestled in a sweet cookie.

May contain nuts.

drinks.name: #216 - Red Velvet Affair
drinks.description:
This indulgent hot chocolate blends the bold richness of Township 7 Merlot with aromatic 70% Fleur de Cao dark chocolate and creamy Avalon Dairy milk. Infused with Uganda vanilla and a touch of Vancouver Island smoked sea salt, this decadent creation is finished with house-made whipped cream and a dusting of freeze-dried blackberry powder. It's an elegant tribute to B.C.'s vineyards and artisan producers.

On the side, creamy cranberry goat cheese served with crisp artisan crackers, a perfect balance to the bold richness of the Red Velvet Affair. The cheese's tang and subtle sweetness complement the merlot-chocolate's depth while refreshing your palate between sips.

Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: #217 - Golden Whispers
drinks.description:
A decadent blend of Callebaut Belgian white chocolate, Avalon Dairy milk, delicately infused with Uganda vanilla, cream cheese, and caramel. Finished with a swirl of whipped cream, a drizzle of golden caramel, and a crumble of Biscoff cookies, it's a silky, buttery dream inspired by classic cheesecake.

Served with a handcrafted sandwich of smooth Uno Gelato Vanilla Bean Gelato layered between two crisp Biscoff cookies. The gelato's delicate sweetness and vanilla warmth harmonize with the spiced caramel tones of the Golden Whispers.

drinks.name: #218 - La Dolce Notte
drinks.description:
Indulge in the art of simplicity. La Dolce Notte is a silky vegan hot chocolate crafted with Belgian Dark 54% 811 Slab Vegan Chocolate and creamy oat milk, delicately infused with marzipan for a nutty, aromatic sweetness. Finished with a sprinkle of toasted sliced almonds, this creation is a warm invitation to slow down and savour the night.

Served with a little scoop of our Almond Lemon Siciliano Sorbetto - or a sorbetto of your choice, to brighten your palate with a refreshing citrus contrast that complements the drink's deep, velvety richness.

Vegan, dairy-free, gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #219 - What the Fudge (Cherry Edition)
drinks.description:
Rich cocoa meets a kiss of cherry - pure velvet in a cup.

Served with dark chocolate-dipped New York-style cheesecake truffles!

drinks.name: #220 - The White Key Lime Whisper
drinks.description:
Zesty lime meets silky white chocolate - sunshine in a mug.

Served with a lemon brulee square.

drinks.name: #221 - Hot-Ch-Ocotopus
drinks.description:
A decadent house-made chocolate syrup with steamed milk, whipped cream and chocolate sprinkles. Served in an adorable souvenir take-home mug.

On the side, a handmade octopus sugar cookie.

drinks.name: #222 - Finding Cocoa
drinks.description:
Creamy peppermint white hot chocolate, topped with whipped cream and orange sprinkles. Served in Nemo's own souvenir take-home mug.

Paired with a clownfish cookie.

drinks.name: #223 - Red Fortune Hot Chocolate
drinks.description: Made with ruby chocolate and served with Mississippi chocolate cake.

drinks.name: #224 - Glampfire Sweetgrass Hot Chocolate with a HYPE Huckleberry S'more
drinks.description: This dark, sweetgrass-smoked hot chocolate, made for us by HYPE, will pair nicely with a s'more made with a maple graham cracker, marshmallow with a huckleberry jelly inside, and coated in HYPE Chocolate.

drinks.name: #225 - Elderflower Noir Cocoa
drinks.description: Real dark Callebaut chocolate infused with elderflower and garnished with chocolate curls and dried flowers. Served with a mini vanilla shortbread cookie.

drinks.name: #226 - Mocha & Morsel
drinks.description:
White chocolate mocha with an almond shortbread cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: #227 - Matcha Moonlight
drinks.description: White hot chocolate, kinako latte with a black sesame milk tea cookie.

drinks.name: #228 - Big MAC
drinks.description:
Toasted, house-made macadamia nut praline with our custom house-made hot chocolate blend of dark chocolate, cinnamon, whipping cream, sugar, and milk, all steamed together and frothed to order. Topped with a light white chocolate foam and ground toasted macadamia nuts to finish.

Served with a macadamia white chocolate cookie.

drinks.name: #229 - S'morsgasbord
drinks.description:
Our delicious, thick hot chocolate base, made in-house with cinnamon, sugar, whipping cream, milk and dark chocolate. Topped with a marshmallow foam that we will roast in front of you!

Served with a garnish of our sweet honey graham cracker.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #230 - Umaji-mura - The Yuzu Forest
drinks.description:
A creamy matcha white chocolate oatmilk latte with a white chocolate dipped rim, topped with a cloud of yuzu-infused vegan whip.

On the side, crafted by our talented friends at Level V Bakery, is a Yuzu cream puff dipped in rich matcha white chocolate. This dreamy set is perfectly balanced, not too sweet, and made entirely from 100% plant-based ingredients (as always). Themed merch is also available at the café throughout the Hot Chocolate Festival.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: #231 - Hojicha Murasaki
drinks.description:
This combination has been the most requested one since we opened, and we're excited to make it happen through the Hot Chocolate Festival. Hojicha Murasaki is a soothing hojicha white chocolate oat milk latte with real purple yam paste, served in a cup dipped in sweet UBE white chocolate, and topped with a cloud of velvety UBE whip.

Paired with a delicate hojicha black sesame tart (gf), this drink brings together two earthy flavours so harmoniously - the warm, nutty, and slightly smoky notes of roasted hojicha and the subtly sweet, nutty richness of vibrant purple ube.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: #232 - Lost Love Raspberrilicious Hot Chocolate Affogato
drinks.description:
The main attraction is a scoop of our handmade raspberry sorbetto swimming in bold espresso and topped with our vanilla whipped cream and fresh raspberry coulis.

Paired with rich, dark hot chocolate on the side.

Available for cafe service only. Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #233 - Hot Cocoa-Lanche
drinks.description:
Everything you want in a hot chocolate, just more, and more and more. Big enough to share, too good to give up! We are not re-inventing the wheel here, but this rich classic favourite is sure to please.

Served with an avalanche of toasted marshmallows on top. We won't tell you how we make it, but it may just be your favourite hot chocolate ever.

Available for cafe service only. Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: #234 - Cinna-Da-Bom Sticky Bun Hot Cocoa
drinks.description:
This is our most insane creation yet. We soak a beautiful, fresh cinnamon bun in hot chocolate, fudge and caramel. Top it with whipping cream, Skor and throw on more chocolate and caramel sauce. Think, everything hot chocolate but in edible form. It's ooey gooey and so damn yummy!

This unique reverse combo serves up your hot chocolate as a mini side treat.

Available for cafe service only.
